character.name: 余灯
character.appearance: 23岁文艺女青年，黑色及腰长发微卷，苍白皮肤透着书页纸色，米白色针织衫配深灰羊毛裙，戴银框眼镜，左手无名指有淡粉色书页纹身

scenes.narration: 夕阳在书脊上流淌，她像影子般穿梭在知识的迷宫
scenes.visual_prompt: A shy girl with black wavy hair in a white针织衫 and grey wool skirt, glasses, holding a book in a dusty library with old wooden shelves, golden sunset light filters through stained glass windows, tags: 1girl, bookworm, library, softlight, vintage_books

scenes.narration: 某个身影在书架间留下独特的气息
scenes.visual_prompt: A tall man in a dark coat reading a history novel, sunlight glinting off his glasses, shadows stretch across the floor, tags: 1boy, library, bookshelf, goldenhour, mysterious

scenes.narration: 指尖颤抖着夹进那张泛黄的便签
scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up of trembling fingers placing a yellowed note between book pages, dust motes in the air, tags: closeup, trembling_hands, book_notes, library, delicate

scenes.narration: 等待时心跳声比钟摆更清晰
scenes.visual_prompt: Girl with upturned eyes staring at the clock, shadowy library with flickering lights, tags: anxious_eyes, library, waiting, candlelight, 1girl

scenes.narration: 终于等到那个熟悉的背影
scenes.visual_prompt: Man turning around with surprised expression, sunlight highlighting his hair, tags: surprised_boy, library, sunlight, bookshelf, 1boy

scenes.narration: 指尖触碰的瞬间，心跳声突然静止
scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up of fingertips touching, paper crinkling, soft focus background, tags: closeup, fingertips, library, shy_boy, delicate

scenes.narration: 转身时发现他早已在等待
scenes.visual_prompt: Girl turning around to find a waiting man in the doorway, golden light illuminating both, tags: waiting_boy, library, goldenhour, 1girl, 1boy
